prestazioni: Engine swap to a **UMZ-4218.10** (2.9L inline-4, 112 HP stock) with forged internals: **Mahle forged pistons (8.2:1 CR)**, **Crower forged connecting rods**, and **ARP head studs** for boost readiness. Turbocharged with a **Garrett GT2860RS** (0.63 A/R, 550HP capable) on a **custom tubular manifold** (fabricated by **Stinger Performance**), paired with a **Tial MV-R 44mm wastegate** and **HKS SSQV4 blow-off valve**. Fuel system upgraded with **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump**, **ID1000x injectors**, and a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** for standalone management.

Drivetrain reinforcement: **UAZ-452-specific reinforced bellhousing (Safir Off-Road)**, **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily disc**, and **custom 3.92:1 gear set (fabricated by KAMAZ Racing)** for the stock transfer case. Front and rear **QuattroGrip limited-slip differentials** with **40% lockup bias** for off-road dominance.

Suspension overhaul: **Ohlins TTX22M coilovers (2-way adjustable, 200mm travel)** with **custom valving for UAZ chassis**, paired with **Polyurethane bushings (SuperPro 8070K)** and **heavy-duty sway bars (Addco 1.25"). Braking upgraded to **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (330mm rotors, front)** and **Wilwood rear drums (254mm, vented)** with **Motul RBF660 brake fluid**.
estetica: Body reinforcement: **Custom tubular space frame (fabricated by Off-Road Unlimited)** with **aluminum honeycomb panels (Aerocell 3mm)** for weight reduction. **Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (UAZ-specific, fiberglass)** with **custom fender flares (3.5" wider than stock)** and **carbon fiber hood (Seibon CF, vented)** for heat extraction.

Exterior styling: **Full respray in **PPG Deltron Urethane (Matte Military Green, DDL 9300)**, with **3M Scotchlite reflective striping (Type 8910)** for off-road visibility. **Baja Designs Squadron Pro LED light pods (50W, amber lenses)** mounted on a **custom roof rack (Prinsu Design, aluminum)**. **BFGoodrich KM3 tires (285/75R16, 10-ply)** on **Method MR701 wheels (16x8, +12 offset)** for aggressive stance.

Interior overhaul: **Full custom roll cage (8-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly)** with **Sparco Pro ADV seats (aluminum base, 6-point harnesses)**. **Alcantara-wrapped dashboard (custom stitching by Katzkin)** with **Aim MXS Strada digital dash (12.3")** and **Racepak IQ3 logger**. **Sound deadening (Dynamat Xtreme)** and **custom aluminum storage panels (fabricated by 4Wheel Parts)** for tools/gear.
